arts.ttl: Serie A title race: Which results Inter, Napoli and Atalanta need
arts.sum: The Serie A title race could not be much closer heading into the Scudetto clash...

Atalanta are coming off another 5-0 win on the road, this time against Empoli last Sunday. The Bergamaschi put aside their Champions League exit with a huge win that leaves them three points short of...

arts.ttl: Preview: Atalanta BC vs. Venezia - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Serie A clash between Atalanta BC and Venezia, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
